arts.ttl: Stockport beat Huddersfield to clinch play-off spot
arts.sum: Fraser Horsfall and Ollie Norwood scored in a 2-1 comeback win.

Stockport put another point on the board late on at Peterborough to all-but secure their place in the top six. The Hatters look set to finish either fourth or fifth, meaning they're likely to face Ch...

arts.ttl: Preview: Stockport County vs. Huddersfield Town - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Monday's League One clash between Stockport County and Huddersfield Town, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
